title: cyrtomium muticum
intro: Cyrtomium muticum, also known as the Oriental netveil or cinnamon fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyrtomium muticum include its potential to help manage arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety as a treatment should be further researched and validated.
